context_for_next_testing_agent: Blocks 9-13 fully implemented and tested: 1) Block 9 - Auto-enrollment config at /api/loyalty/auto-enroll-config allows setting target_stage and default_sequence_id for automatic loyalty enrollment. UI tab 'Auto-Inscripción' on Loyalty page. 2) Block 10 - Campaigns CRUD at /api/campaigns with target_count calculation, batch send, stats cards on UI. 3) Block 11 - Reminders CRUD at /api/reminders with days_since_last_interaction filter, batch execution. 4) Block 12 - Advisor stats dashboard at /api/dashboard/advisor-stats returns advisors with total_leads, won_leads, revenue, conversion_rate and summary. UI shows 'Por Asesor' tab with horizontal bar chart and advisor cards. 5) Block 13 - AI conversation analysis at /api/chat/analyze/{session_id} uses GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations LlmChat class. Returns resumen, sentimiento, respuestas_sugeridas. UI has 'IA Análisis' button that shows analysis panel.

bug_fixes_applied.Block 13 AI Analysis: Fixed import error - changed from 'from emergentintegrations.llm.chat import chat, ChatConfig' to 'from emergentintegrations.llm.chat import LlmChat, UserMessage'. LlmChat requires api_key, session_id, system_message constructor args. with_model takes provider and model args. send_message takes UserMessage(text=...) and returns string directly.
